query: SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as color_count, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.id) as size_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN productColors pc ON p.id = pc.productId LEFT JOIN productSizes ps ON p.id = ps.productId GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 39BtYQyKHXzYXJi.7163615a4154 --database kDHKMkQxvxGGSdVdvmorSF --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.id) as color_count, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.id) as size_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN productColors pc ON p.id = pc.productId LEFT JOIN productSizes ps ON p.id = ps.productId GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
